places.name: Jiufen Old Street
places.address: 基山街, 瑞芳區, 新北市, 九份
places.note: Hillside village of lantern-lit staircase alleys that partly inspired Spirited Away

places.name: Shifen Old Street
places.address: 十分老街, 平溪區, 新北市, 臺灣
places.note: Village on an active rail line, famous for sky lantern launches over the tracks

places.name: Shifen Waterfall
places.address: 新北市, 新寮, 臺灣
places.note: Taiwan's widest waterfall, 40m across, short paved walk from the old street

places.name: Golden Waterfall
places.note: Naturally yellow-orange waterfall from acidic mining runoff, vivid and photogenic

places.name: Jinguashi Gold Ecological Park
places.note: Former gold mine turned heritage park and museum in the hills above the coast

places.name: Houtong Cat Village
places.note: Tiny village overrun with friendly cats, a stop on the same Pingxi rail line

places.name: Sandiaoling Waterfall Trail
places.note: 5–10km hiking trail linking multiple waterfalls, an alternative route into Shifen
